title: Step 2: Add a list of blocks

content.text: Add a Field.list to represent page blocks. In this step the list supports text, image, and gallery blocks.

body.code:
app/
╰ page.tsx

entries/
╰ landing/
  ├ LandingPage.tsx
  ╰ LandingPage.schema.tsx

blocks/
├ text/
│ ├ TextBlock.tsx
│ ╰ TextBlock.schema.tsx
├ image/
│ ├ ImageBlock.tsx
│ ╰ ImageBlock.schema.tsx
╰ gallery/
  ├ GalleryBlock.tsx
  ╰ GalleryBlock.schema.tsx

cms.tsx

content.text: Create each block type as a schema and a matching view component.
Extend the landing schema by adding a blocks list that references those block schemas.
Update the landing view to render each block variant based on its _type.
